gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/208)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/208)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ قَتَلَ أُمَّهُ أَ يَرِثُهَا قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ أَيُّمَا رَجُلٍ ذُو رَحِمٍ قَتَلَ قَرِيبَهُ لَمْ يَرِثْهُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Al Qasim Bin Suleyman who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who killed his mother, would he inherit her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> heard my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Whichever man with relationship kills his relative, would not inherit from him (the one who has been killed)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id has narrated from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad ibn Sulayman who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who has killed his mother; if he can inherit her. He (the Imam) said, ‘I heard my father, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, “Whoever of the relatives kills one of his relatives he cannot inherit from that relative.’””
